message:
feat(crypto): add FROST threshold signing and OwnerSigner trait

Introduce frost-ed25519 backed distributed key generation (DKG) and
threshold signing so the owner key can be split across k-of-n devices
without any single machine holding the complete private key.

The OwnerSigner trait abstracts over single-key and threshold signing;
enrollment approval and node key attestation now accept &dyn OwnerSigner
instead of &Ed25519SigningKey, with integration tests proving the full
DKG -> threshold-sign -> standard-verify round trip.

Also adds W3C Trace Context cross-component contract tests to the audit
module (br21t.3.7).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,6 +14,7 @@ workspace = true
 [dependencies]
 # Signatures
 ed25519-dalek.workspace = true
+frost-ed25519 = "2.2"
 
 # Key exchange
 x25519-dalek.workspace = true
